About Me

Hello, I'm Darkness

I'm a web developer and creative coder passionate about building immersive digital experiences. My work sits at the intersection of art and technology, where I explore the possibilities of modern web technologies to create visually striking, motion-rich interfaces.

With a deep love for dark aesthetics and smooth animations, I specialize in crafting websites that aren't just functional—they're experiences that captivate and engage users from the moment they land on the page.

What I Do

Creative Development

Building unique web experiences with Three.js, WebGL, and advanced CSS animations.

Performance Optimization

Ensuring smooth 60fps animations and optimal loading times with modern tooling.

3D Graphics

Creating particle systems, geometric patterns, and interactive 3D elements for the web.

Dark UI Design

Designing beautiful dark-themed interfaces with carefully crafted color palettes.

My Approach

I believe that motion is emotion. Every animation, every transition, every particle movement should have a purpose—to guide, to delight, or to immerse. I'm constantly pushing the boundaries of what's possible on the web, experimenting with new techniques and technologies.

Whether it's a personal blog, a portfolio site, or a complex web application, I approach each project with the same goal: create something that stands out, performs well, and provides an unforgettable user experience.

Let's Connect

Interested in working together or just want to chat about web animations and dark design?
